title: centaurea nigrescens subsp. neapolitana
intro: Centaurea nigrescens subsp. neapolitana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Centaurea nigrescens subsp. neapolitana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage, which may contribute to its use in treating various conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
